case_title: HUA ZHEN LAN TO VS. INDUSTRIAL AND COMMERCIAL BANK OF CHINA (USA) NA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT INDUSTRIAL AND COMMERCIAL BANK OF CHINA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
